title: elaphoglossum furcatum
intro: Elaphoglossum furcatum, also known as the forked elaphoglossum or forked lip fern, is a type of epiphytic fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily in the form of its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum furcatum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, infections, and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum furcatum are often made by drying the leaves and roots, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
